primary_hypothesis: The frozen 14-D masked MLP fails on the 100-task synthetic development slice because its PPO rollouts contain only fixed 50-task STG trajectories; doubling the horizon while changing the generator/domain makes per-decision errors compound. Replacing half of the fixed transition budget with disjoint 100-task synthetic rollouts should improve size robustness without changing the policy, reward, optimizer, or checkpoint-selection rule.

behavior_cloning.rule: Reuse each seed's exact P1-A04 14-D BC warm-start actor bytes; do not retrain or select a different warm start.

frozen_invariants.reward: negative incremental makespan divided by HEFT makespan

implementation_gates_before_training: Member B approves this design and its machine-readable hash from an immutable remote commit.
The 60 synthetic scenarios and their manifest are materialized before any policy run.
Synthetic scenario ids and content hashes have zero overlap with benchmark train/validation and all frozen P1-B02 development slices.
A dry-run proves exactly 90 episodes and 6000 transitions for each epoch without loading a checkpoint or starting optimization.
Config injection tests reject any change outside the rollout source plan and its coupled episode count.
Public-test JSON/archive bytes are physically absent from the training root.

formal_execution.rerun_policy: No seed, scenario, coefficient, epoch, or checkpoint-selection change after the first successful formal run. Exact transactional resume after an interruption is allowed under the existing P1-03 contract.
formal_execution.development_evaluation: After all five checkpoints are frozen, run the unchanged P1-B02 four-slice development contract exactly once.
formal_execution.independent_review: Member B must reproduce the implementation gates, checkpoint hashes, five-seed training artifacts, and development report from the immutable commit.

success_criteria.size_effect: New masked-MLP ood_size mean_ratio < 1.0 and paired bootstrap 95% CI for new-minus-P1-A04 masked MLP has upper bound < 0.
success_criteria.id_guardrail: New ID mean_ratio < 1.0 and no more than 0.02 above the accepted P1-A04 value 0.709190.
success_criteria.other_slices: ood_ccr and ood_system mean_ratio must each remain < 1.0; the unchanged contract remains authoritative.

stop_rules: If B rejects the design or any pre-training gate fails, do not train; repair only the design/implementation defect and request a new review.
If the one formal run completes and any success criterion fails, retain the accepted P1-A04 model, publish the negative result, and close this candidate without parameter tuning.
A different sampler, coefficient, architecture, reward, feature, epoch count, or checkpoint rule requires a new ADR and a new task id.
Do not claim pure size causality: the frozen ood_size slice also changes generator, topology, bandwidth, and latency.
prohibitions: Do not use the 30 frozen ood_size scenarios for gradients or checkpoint selection.
Do not replace or cherry-pick P1-B02 scenario seeds.
Do not run claim-test-gate or load public-test bytes.
Do not start training before member B signs the design.
